caption: The video depicts a news broadcast featuring a man wearing a dark traditional robe, a matching cap, and eyeglasses. He is gesturing with his right hand while appearing to speak. To his right, an inset graphic displays a smaller photo of another man wearing a red cap, identified by the text "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and the title "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS," under the heading "ON THE PHONE." The screen features a purple and red theme with "PLUS POLITICS" and "PLUSTV" logos. A prominent headline reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen displays "FOLLOW US" alongside social media icons, the URL "UTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA", and "PLUSTVAFRICA." As the clip progresses, the lower banner changes to include "WATCH ON" followed by "DStv C H 408" and "StarTimes C H 308." The visual composition remains largely static, with only slight changes in the man's hand position and the bottom ticker text.
